race.description: It's Okay, Not To Be Okay Hcp
race.comment: BARARI (11) progressed nicely last start to finish a close second over 1112m at Geelong after missing the placings at the previous appearance. That was the best run of the prep to date, drawn well and gets the chance to break through. QUEBECK (2) recorded an all-the-way win last time out by a neck over today's journey at Cranbourne. Another bold showing is expected. NASRAAWY (4) was well-supported first up when he found only one better and draws to get his chance to go one better. TILLYA TEPE (10) broke her maiden last start over 1100m at this track, scoring by 1.3 lengths. Is lightly raced and has plenty of scope for improvement. FLYING MIKKI (1) finished out of the money two starts back then was beaten 6 lengths when ninth in a 1400m contest at Sandown-Lakeside three-and-a-half weeks ago after being in contention on the turn. Beautifully placed and is sure to play a pivotal role.
